description: Transmission BitTorrent client monitoring dashboard. Tracks session stats, per-torrent health, peers, ratios, download progress, and error status.

options.content:
# Transmission Torrent Monitor

Dashboard for [transmission-exporter](https://github.com/khayyamsaleem/transmission-exporter). Use the **Instance**, **Job**, and **Torrent** dropdowns above to filter. The *Session Overview* shows aggregate stats. The main *Torrent Stats* table shows per-torrent health, peers, ratio, and queue position. Expand *Extended Statistics* for upload averages, and *Torrent Health & Progress* for error details, download/seed time charts, and incomplete torrent progress bars.

panels.title: Number of torrents
panels.description: Total number of torrents being managed by Transmission.

panels.title: Current session upload
panels.description: Bytes uploaded during the current Transmission session (since last restart).

panels.title: 1 day upload
panels.description: Upload volume over the last 24 hours.

panels.title: 7 days upload
panels.description: Upload volume over the last 7 days.

panels.title: Total upload
panels.description: Cumulative bytes uploaded across all sessions.
Combined upload rate across all active torrents right now.
panels.title: Current upload speed
Torrents with errors
panels.description: Number of torrents currently reporting an error (tracker warning, tracker error, or local error).

panels.title: Total remaining
panels.description: Sum of bytes still needed to complete all active downloads.

panels.title: Total corrupt
panels.description: Sum of corrupt bytes received across all torrents. High values may indicate network or disk issues.

panels.title: Current session ratio
panels.description: Ratio of uploaded to downloaded bytes in the current session.
Ratio of uploaded to downloaded bytes across all sessions.
panels.title: Overall ratio
Current session download
panels.description: Bytes downloaded during the current Transmission session.

panels.title: 1 day download
panels.description: Download volume over the last 24 hours.
Download volume over the last 7 days.
panels.title: 7 days download
Total download
panels.description: Cumulative bytes downloaded across all sessions.
Combined download rate across all active torrents right now.
panels.title: Current download speed
Upload rate / minute
panels.description: Per-torrent upload rate over time. Stacked area shows contribution of each torrent.
Per-torrent statistics including ratio, peers, size, error status, queue position, and completion date.
panels.title: Torrent stats

panels.description: Extended per-torrent statistics with 30-day average upload rate, 1-day average upload, current upload speed, and all peer/tracker details.
panels.title: Torrent stats

panels.description: Detailed health view per torrent: error status, bytes remaining/valid/corrupt, queue position, last activity, completion date, and time spent downloading and seeding.
panels.title: Torrent health details
Seeding time
panels.description: Total seconds each torrent has spent seeding over time.

panels.title: Downloading time
panels.description: Total seconds each torrent has spent downloading over time.

panels.title: Incomplete torrents - download progress
panels.description: Download progress of incomplete torrents displayed as LCD bar gauges. Only torrents with less than 100% completion are shown.

title: Transmission
